headline: Assessing FirstEnergy (FE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
summary: Recent performance and context for FirstEnergy stock Without a specific headline event driving FirstEnergy (FE) today, investors are instead weighing its recent share performance and financial profile, including a US$25.3b market value and exposure across regulated transmission and distribution. See our latest analysis for FirstEnergy. At a share price of US$43.82, FirstEnergy has seen its short term share price momentum soften, including a decline of around 12.5% over the past 30 days...
